## Problem

<!-- What user, reliability, security, or operational problem does this solve? -->

## Design

<!-- State the boundary, important tradeoffs, and alternatives rejected. -->

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run ci`

## Risk

- [ ] No new durable sensitive data
- [ ] No expansion of external action authority
- [ ] Migration and rollback impact documented, or not applicable
- [ ] User-facing and operational documentation updated, or not applicable

## Evidence

<!-- Add synthetic logs, test output, or aggregate metrics. Never attach private observations. -->
